deletion.notes: dpo@ is the DPO contact per the privacy policy pattern. One of France's largest phone directories. Contact email and playbook structure based on standard French data-broker opt-out patterns; live Art.17 verification pending.

playbook: Search the record on 118000.fr (one of France's largest phone directories).
Send Art. 17 erasure request to dpo@118000.fr (French or English).
If no response within 30 days, escalate to CNIL.
quirks: Listings include both phone numbers and inferred household members — request removal of all associated data points.
Re-listing risk: high (118000 aggregates from public phone books and operator directories).
